introSection: Cocoa Cruiser is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 2014, the ride is located in the Music Box Way area. It replaced the Tiny Timbers log flume.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track and blue supports. The ride has a single helix.

fullText:
Cocoa Cruiser is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. Opened in 2014, the ride is located in the Music Box Way area. It replaced the Tiny Timbers log flume.

Yellow track and blue supports. The ride has a single helix.
